mission_01.title: Site Entry Protocol
mission_01.description: Establish field terminal connection and locate the first cryo specimen.
mission_01.objective: Scan the Brachiosaurus embryo QR at Site Entry Zone.

fieldAnalysis.observation: The specimen appears to prefer open areas with elevated foliage.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search locations with open areas and trees a tall herbivore could feed.

mission_02.title: Horned Hunter Extraction
mission_02.description: Ceratosaurus predator signature detected in Sector B.
mission_02.objective: Scan the Ceratosaurus embryo QR code.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Trace markers indicate a horned carnivore patrolling forest margins and riparian corridors.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search locations where a mid-size predator could ambush prey near cover and water.

mission_03.title: River Basin Sweep
mission_03.description: Large aquatic predator signature in sunken river basin.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Bio-signatures are concentrated along sunken freshwater channels and river basin runoff.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search locations adjacent to sunken water where a large aquatic predator could hunt.

mission_04.title: Shark-Tooth Pursuit
mission_04.description: Massive terrestrial predator tracks crossing eastern ridge.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Heavy predator tracks suggest wide-ranging patrols across open ridge terrain.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search elevated routes and ridge crossings where a massive carnivore could stalk prey.

mission_05.title: King of the Kill Zone
mission_05.objective: Locate and scan the Tyrannosaurus embryo.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Dominance markers and kill-zone scent trails indicate an apex predator holding territory.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search locations with recent carcass activity or territorial boundary markers.

mission_06.title: Hybrid Containment
mission_06.description: Unknown hybrid strain detected — proceed with extreme caution.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Anomalous hybrid strain readings show erratic movement through dense cover and ruins.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search isolated structures and overgrown sectors where an unstable hybrid could hide.

mission_07.title: Bull Run Protocol
mission_07.description: Aggressive carnivore movement near southern fence.

fieldAnalysis.observation: High-speed burst signatures detected along fence lines and open sprint corridors.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search long sightlines and perimeter paths where a bull predator could charge.

mission_08.title: Giant Recovery
mission_08.description: Largest carnivore signature on record detected in deep sector.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Seismic footfall patterns suggest a colossal carnivore moving through deep sector jungle.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search wide clearings and heavy-traffic game trails large enough for a giant predator.

mission_09.title: Pack Hunt Extraction
mission_09.description: Coordinated pack signatures increasing in maintenance corridors.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Coordinated pack signatures are clustering in narrow corridors and enclosed routes.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search maintenance paths and choke points where a raptor pack could coordinate a hunt.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Classified hybrid trace readings are unstable and shifting near high-security sectors.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Search restricted coordinates and containment-adjacent zones for the final specimen.

mission_11.title: Cryo Extraction
mission_11.description: All embryos secured. Proceed to the extraction point before the window closes.
mission_11.objective: Follow the extraction clue, then scan the extraction beacon QR code on arrival.

fieldAnalysis.observation: Extraction coordinates locked. InGen transport is standing by.
fieldAnalysis.searchHint: Proceed to the location shown in the extraction clue image.
